m: n.法官，裁判；审判员 v.判断，断定；审判
e: Judging from what he said, he must be an honest man.
由他所说的来判断，他一定是个诚实的人。

m: ad.正好，恰好；刚才；仅仅，不过a.公正的
e: I've just had my breakfast.
我刚吃过早饭。
To do justice to him, we must be just.
要公平地对待他，我们必须要公正。

m: (kept,kept) v.保存，保留；保持，继续不断；饲养
e: I had to walk fast to keep up with him.
我要快走才能跟上他。

m: n.种类 a.体贴的，友好的
e: She is kind to all kinds of animals.
她对各种动物都很友好。
She was on her knees planting flowers in the garden.
她在花园里跪着种花。
She was knocked down by a bus.
她被一辆公共汽车撞倒在地。
I don't know Dr.Smith, but I know of him.
我不认识史密斯博士，但我听说过他。
He has gained a good knowledge of biology.
他已经学到不少生物知识。
His beautiful home was the result of many years of labor.
他那美丽的家是多年辛劳的成果。
During the war there was a serious lack of food.
战争时期，食物相当紧缺。
Only human beings have the ability to use language.
只有人类才有能力运用语言。
He has a large family to support.
他有一大家子要养。

m: a.最后的；刚刚过去的 ad.最后；上一次 n.[the~]最后一个 v.延续，持续
e: The performance lasted nearly three hours, but few people left the theatre early.
表演持续了将近3小时，但几乎没人提前离开剧院。
This morning I was late for school because my mother was late with breakfast.
因为我妈做早饭晚了，所以今天早上我上学迟到了。

m: a.（两者中）后者的 n.[the~]（两者中的）后者
e: They keep horses and cattle, the former for riding, the latter for food.
他们养马和牛，前者供乘骑，后者供食用。
He laughs best who laughs last.
[谚]谁笑在最后，谁笑得最甜。
He laid a new cloth on the table.
他在餐桌上铺了一块新桌布。
Hard work leads to success and failure often lies in laziness.
辛勤工作通向成功，失败在于懒惰。
The leaves become yellow in autumn.
秋天树叶变黄。
It is never too late to learn.
学习不嫌晚。
It's the least I can do to help.
这是我所能帮忙做的最起码的事。
Tomorrow we will leave Changsha and they will leave for Beijing.
明天我们将离开长沙，而他们将动身去北京。
He attended a lecture on American literature yesterday.
他昨天去听了一场美国文学讲座。
You'd better not lend him the books borrowed from the library.
你最好不要把从图书馆借来的书借给他。
The length of the bridge is 200 metres.
那座桥有200米长。
I am afraid she will let us down badly.
我担心她将让我们大失所望。
Be quiet in the library.
在图书馆要安静。

m: vi.(lay,lain)躺，卧；位于；在于； (lied,lied)说谎 n.谎话
e: The man lying there lied that he had laid the money on the table.
躺在那里的人撒谎说他把钱放在桌子上了。
Many people lost their lives in the fire.
许多人在火灾中丧生了。
Would you like me to give you a lift？
愿意让我送你一程吗？

m: (lit,lit或-ed,-ed) vt.点燃，点亮 n.光；灯（光） a.明亮的；淡的；轻的
e: He lighted a candle and handed the lighted candle to me.
他点燃一支蜡烛，然后把燃烧的蜡烛递给我。
I like visiting friends on Sundays and I like to visit Joan this Sunday.
我喜欢星期天拜访朋友，这个星期天我想去拜访琼。
It is likely to rain.
可能要下雨了。
Seating is limited to 500.
座位限定500个。
They have opened a new bus line.
他们新开了一条公交线路。
I was listening, but heard nothing.
我在仔细听，但什么也听不见。

m: (less,least) a.小的；少的 ad.少许，稍微；几乎没有 pron.一点，少量
e: He has given us not a little trouble.
他给我们带来不少麻烦。

m: [lɪv] v.居住；活着；生活；以……为主食[laɪv]a.活的；现场（直播）的
e: The live young man who lives near the river bank once saved our lives.
住在河岸附近的那个生机勃勃的年轻人曾救过我们的命。
These backpacks are designed to carry a heavy load.
这些背包是为携带重物而设计的。
Two white loaves，please.
请拿两条白面包。
Don't forget to lock the door when you go out.
出去时别忘了锁门。
I was travelling alone in the lonely mountain.
我独自走在荒凉的山野里，虽孤身一人，但并不感到寂寞。
I did not feel lonely though I was alone.
As long as you need me, I will stay.
只要你需要，我就留下来。
It is reported that the police will soon look into the case of two missing children.
据报道，警方将迅速介入调查两名失踪儿童的案件。
She wore a long,loose coat.
她穿着一件长而宽松的外套。
I nearly lost the opportunity.
我几乎错失了良机。
The accident caused a great loss of money.
这次事故造成了重大的财产损失。
What a lot of presents！
礼物真多啊！
He is making such a loud noise that I can't study here.
他弄这么大的噪音，我不能在这儿学习。
If you would be loved, love and be lovable. （Franklin）
要想被人爱，就要去爱别人，并让自己可爱。
Good luck to you！
祝你好运！
You're only allowed to take one piece of hand luggage onto a plane.
只允许携带一件手提行李上飞机。

m: n. 魔法；a.有魔力的，魔术的，神奇的
e: His words had a magic effect on us.
他的话对我们有一种魔力般的作用。
Tom played a major part in the improvement of teaching.
汤姆在改进教学方面起了主要作用。
The majority of people prefer peace to war.
大多数人都喜欢和平而不是战争。
He made up some excuse about his daughter being sick.
他编了个借口，说他的女儿病了。
They tried time and again and at last they managed to escape to South America.
他们试了一次又一次，最后设法逃到了南美洲。
She walked in a leisurely manner, listening to him on that subject with a pleasure manner，for she knew that it is bad manners to interrupt.
她慢悠悠地走着，态度和蔼地听他谈论这件事，因为她知道打断别人的话是不礼貌的。
As/So many men, so many minds.
人各有志。

m: n.记号；分数；目标 vt.标明，做记号；批分数
e: My teacher gave me full marks for dictation.
老师给我的听写打了满分。
My father went to the market to buy some vegetables.
我爸爸到集市去买了些蔬菜。
The king took the woman to his palace and married her.
国王将那个女人带回他的宫殿并娶了她。

m: n.比赛；对手；配偶；火柴 vt.与……相匹敌；与……相配
e: This afternoon's match is sure to be an exciting one，for the two sides are well-matched.
今天下午的比赛一定很精彩，因为两边都旗鼓相当。
Plastic is a widely-used material.
塑料是一种使用广泛的材料。

m: n.事情，问题；物质 vi.要紧，有关系
e: Does it matter what I think？
我怎么想重要吗？
Such an experienced teacher may sometimes make mistakes.
经验这么丰富的老师有时也可能出差错。
Let me have a look.
让我看一看。
"That would mean wasting a lot of labor."
"那将意味着浪费许多劳动力。
Really？I don't mean to waste any labor."
""是吗？
Driving is the quickest means of getting there.
开车去那里是最快的方法。
Jim went to answer the phone.Meanwhile, Harry started to prepare lunch.
吉姆去接电话，与此同时，哈里开始准备午饭。
She measured her daughter for a new dress.
她为女儿量制新衣。
A good medicine tastes bitter.
[谚]良药苦口。
I met your sister on the way.
我在路上遇见了你妹妹。
The basic rule of physical and mental health is to keep smiling.
身心健康的基本原则是保持笑容。
He speaks French, not to mention English.
他能说法语，英语就更不用说了。
They were lost at sea, at the mercy of wind and weather.
他们在海上迷失了方向，任由风和天气摆布。
We went there merely for enjoying ourselves.
我们去那儿只不过想玩得开心。
Tom is very untidy, he always leaves his room in a mess.
汤姆非常不爱整洁，他的房间总是乱七八糟的。
Can you take a message for me？
你能替我带个口信吗？
I think we should try again using a different method.
我想我们应该用不同的方法再试一次。

m: a.中间的；中等的 n.中间
e: There is a car in the middle of the road.
路中间有辆汽车。
You might find it is a little cold in the train.
你也许会发现在火车里有点冷。
The population of that city is about eight million.
那个城市的人口大约是八百万。

m: n.头脑，思想；主意vt.注意；关心；介意
e: My parents don't mind what job I do as long as I am happy.
我父母不介意我做什么工作，只要我高兴就行。
The Chinese nation includes more than 50 national minorities besides the Hans.
除汉族外，中华民族还有五十多个少数民族。
I'll tell him the minute he comes.
他一来我就告诉他。
Miss Rose missed the only bus that could take her to see her parents whom she missed very much.
罗斯小姐错过了唯一一辆能带她去见想念已久的父母的公共汽车。
I think you must be mistaking me for someone else.
我想你准是把我认错成其他人了。
This is not the right moment to invite me, I am too tired to walk.
现在不是邀请我的恰当时间，我都累得走不动了。

m: (much,many的比较级） ad.更 pron.更多的量，另外的一些
e: He worked no more than a week, so he could get more than 100 yuan.
他只干了一个星期，因此他能得到100多元。

m: (much,many的最高级） ad.最；非常 pron.大部分，大多数
e: This is a very interesting book but it is not the most interesting book I have ever read.
这是一本非常有趣的书，但不是我看过的最有趣的书。
My parents kept moving house because of my dad's job.
因爸爸工作的缘故，我父母不断地搬家。
Given much more time, we will read more books.
给我们更多的时间，我们将会阅读更多的书。
The police were trying to find out who had murdered the mayor.
警方正在努力追查是谁谋杀了市长。
I like classical music better than popular music.
比起流行音乐家来，我更喜欢古典音乐。
This must be the book you want.
这一定是你要的那本书了。
You must stop biting your nails.
你必须戒掉咬指甲的习惯。

m: n.名字 vt.命名；说出……的名字；选中
e: This coastal area was named a national wildlife reserve last year.
去年这片沿海地区被提名为国家野生保护区。
They all went up some narrow steps into a large room.
他们都走上几个狭窄的台阶进入一间大房间。
This is the national dress of our country.
这是我们国家的民族服装。

m: a.本国的；土生土长的；生来的
e: She returned to her native land.
她回她的祖国去了。
It is natural that we should try to improve our standard of living, but not at any cost.
我们自然要努力提高生活水平，但不能不惜任何代价。
Just let nature take its course.
就顺其自然吧。

m: prep.接近 a.近的；接近的 ad.接近；几乎
e: Tony is near to me, but Jack is far from me.
托尼离我很近，但是杰克离我很远。
Nearly four decades later, I still look back fondly to that golden day at sea.
近四十年过去了，我依然怀念海上的那段美好时光。
It is necessary that he (should) come here every Sunday.
他有必要每个星期天都到这里来。
The house needs cleaning.
这栋房子需要清扫。
Neither of them can cook.
他们俩都不会烹饪。
Nobody knows what she is nervous about.
没有人知道她在为什么紧张不安。
Some shoes are not good, but they look very nice.
有些鞋质量不好，但很好看。
The party went on all night.
聚会持续了一整夜。
The room has no windows.
那个房间没有窗户。
Tony nodded his head.
托尼点了点头。
I heard a noise in the next room.
我听到隔壁房间有声音。
"Wow！You've got so manyclothes？""
"哇塞！
But none of them are in fashion now."
你有这么多衣服呀！
It's normal to feel tired after doing hard work.
做劳累的工作后感觉疲劳是正常的。
The north half of the earth is called the Northern Hemisphere.
地球的北半部分称为北半球。
I don't know his name.
我不知道他的名字。

m: n.便条；钞票，纸币；笔记；注释；音符，音调 vt.记下，记录；注意
e: Please make a note of the dates.
请记下日期。

m: pron.没有任何东西，没有什么；无关紧要的东西或事 ad.一点也不，并不
e: She'd had nothing but bad luck.
她有的只不过是坏运气。

m: vt.注意到；通知n.布告，通知；注意
e: Take a notice of what he says.
注意他所说的话。
It's raining now !
现在正在下雨。
Old English is very different from the English we speak nowadays.
古英语与我们今天所说的英语有很大的区别。
Nuclear weapons threaten the peace and security of the world.
核武器威胁着世界的和平与安全。
A number of teachers are present today, and the number of them is 300.
许多教师都出席了，有300人。
Everyone obeys the rules and anybody who breaks the rules is punished.
人人遵守规则，任何人违反了规则都要受罚。
Tell me the names of the objects in this room.
告诉我这屋里的东西的名称。

m: vt.注意到；观察；监视，观测；遵守（法律等）
e: The police observed that the driver did not observe the traffic rules.
警察注意到那位司机没有遵守交通规则。
It was obvious to everyone that the child had been hardly treated.
对每个人都显而易见，那个孩子受过虐待。

m: vt.占据，占领，占用；使忙碌，使从事
e: She occupied herself with routine office tasks.
她忙于办公室的日常工作。
It didn't occur to her to ask for help.
她没想到请别人帮忙。
He is a man of ability.
他是个有能力的人。
The boys offer to help the old woman.
男孩们提出要帮助那个老太太。
She works in an office.
她在办公室工作。
The water is fine once you're in.
你一旦下了水，就会觉得水里挺舒适。

m: num.一 pron.一个人，任何人；（同种类的）物
e: No one knew why the war broke out.
没有人知道战争爆发的原因。
I borrowed some books for myself, but when I was going to read them, the lamp went out of itself and I had to sit in the dark by myself.
我为自己借了一些书，正打算读，这时灯却自动灭了，我不得不独自坐在黑暗中。

m: a.唯一的，仅有的ad.仅仅，只；只是
e: Only after they had discussed the matter for several hours did they reach a decision.
他们对此事讨论了几个小时之后才做出决定。
It suddenly occurred to him to open the box.
他突然想到打开箱子看看。

m: v.动手术；操作；实施，负责，经营；运转
e: The doctor began to operate on his mother.
医生开始给他妈妈做手术。
In my opinion, it's a very sound investment.
依我看，这是一项十分可靠的投资。

m: a.对面的；相反的ad./prep.在……对面 n.[the~]相反的人/事
e: John and Mary sat at opposite ends of the table.
约翰和玛丽面对面坐在餐桌两头。
We stayed for an hour or so.
我们停留了一个小时左右。

m: vt.命令；订购；点菜 n.命令；顺序；订单
e: He ordered his secretary to place an order for 100 books and arrange them in order of size.
他命令秘书去订购100本书并把它们按大小顺序排列。
It was a piece of ordinary dance music.
那是一首普通的舞曲。
They organized a new political party.
他们组建了一个新政党。
The form cannot be signed by anyone other than yourself.
除了你自己，任何人都不能签这个表单。

m: ad.否则，不然；除此以外；在其他方面
e: You must wash your hands before you eat， otherwise you will get an upset stomach.
饭前必须洗手，不然的话，你的胃会不舒服的。
By now his restaurant ought to be full of people.
到这个钟点他的餐厅应该是宾客盈门的。
The core of the earth is made up of a liquid outer core, and a solid inner core.
地核是由一个液体的外核和一个固体的内核组成的。

m: ad.翻转；遍布；越过；全部结束prep.（数目、程度）超过；在……以上；遍及
e: They have travelled all over the world.
他们那游遍了全世界。
She finally overcame her fear of the dark.
她终于克服了对黑暗的恐惧。
He owes his success to hard work.
他的成功是靠勤奋工作。
He has a house of his own, and the house was built on his own last year.
他有自己的一栋房子，这栋房子是去年他独自建的。
Keep pace with the times.
与时俱进。
Kelly packed her things before breakfast.
凯莉早饭前整理好了行装。
She felt a sharp pain in her stomach.
她感到胃部一阵剧痛。

m: v.（用颜料等）画，绘画；涂（色）；（给……）上油漆n.油漆
e: I painted the wall white.
我把墙涂成白色。
Work in pairs.
结对工作。
Start a new paragraph here.
从这里开始另起一段。
Oh, pardon me, I didn't mean to disturb you.
噢，对不起，我不是有意打扰你。

m: n.部分；角色；部位；零件 a.局部的，部分的v.分离；分割
e: How many countries took part in the lastOlympic Games？
有多少个国家参加了上届奥运会？
Please don't be too particular about her job.
请不要对她的工作太挑剔。
Clare's my tennis partner.
克莱尔是我的网球搭档。

m: v.经过；（时间）过去；通过（考试等）；传递；超过
e: The road is only wide enough for small cars to pass.
这条路的宽度只够小汽车通过。

m: n.通道，走廊；（文章等的）一节、一段
e: The police forced a passage through the crowd.
警察在人群中强行开辟出一条通道。
In spite of my efforts the boy remained passive.
尽管我很努力，那个男孩还是很消极。
You need a passport to enter a foreign country.
进入外国国境需要护照。
Be patient when you examine patients.
给病人做检查时要有耐心。

m: (paid,paid) v.付酬；付款；偿还 n.工资
e: I'll pay you back on Friday.
我星期五还你钱。
They live together in peace.
他们和睦相处。
Three percent of the money is mine.
百分之三的钱是我的。
You are expected to perform your duties.
你应该履行你的义务。
Permit me to lead the way，sir.
先生，请让我来带路吧。
In my personal opinion, I am against the plan.
依我个人的意见，我反对那项计划。
I've persuaded him to stop smoking by advising him many times.
通过多次劝告，我说服他戒了烟。
He picked out the ripest peach for me.
他给我挑了个最熟的桃子。
I have got piles of work to do today.
我今天有大量的工作要做。
It's a pity that you can't stay longer.
你不能再多停留些时间，真是遗憾。

m: n.地方，地点 vt.放置；安置，安排
e: From now on I will take the place of Mr.George as chairman of the meeting.
从现在起我将代替乔治先生担任会议的主席。
Jane Eyre is a plain girl.
简·爱是一个普通的女孩子。
What plans do you have for the holidays？
你对这些假期有什么计划吗？

m: v.玩耍；演奏，播放；扮演；比赛 n.玩耍；戏剧
e: He is learning to play the piano.
他在学习弹钢琴。
We had a pleasant time.
我们度过了一段愉快的时光。
I did it to please my parents.
我这么做是要让父母高兴。
He was pleased to give up the lifestyle of a rich man.
他很高兴放弃富人的生活方式。
The garden has given pleasure to many people.
那座花园给了很多人快乐。
There is plenty of time.
还有足够的时间。

m: v.指，指向 n.点；要点；得分
e: He was always very keen to point out my mistakes.
他总是热衷于指出我的错误。
It's polite to say "thank you", and to open doors for people.
说"谢谢"和为别人开门是有礼貌的行为。
His political views are suitable for the development of the country.
他的政治观点适合这个国家的发展。
We must stop the pollution of our beaches.
我们必须制止对海滩的污染。

m: a.流行的，受欢迎的；大众的
e: It's very popular with many people, but there are still some people who do not like it at all.

这座城市的显著发展在于有意识地进行规划来保护过去（的历史）。

m: 受尊敬的;受敬重的;受重视的
e: They make me feel valued and respected.
他们让我感到受到了重视和尊重。
He was so thankful and sent me a nice e-mail with pictures.
他非常感激，给我发了一封很漂亮的电子邮件，并附上了照片。

m: 非常兴奋的;极为激动的
e: Mum Sandra was thrilled that her son would achieve his dreams.
母亲桑德拉很激动儿子能实现自己的梦想。
Soup dumplings encase hot and tasty soup.
小笼包包裹着热腾腾的美味汤汁。

m: 有益的;值得做的;报酬高的
e: Learning about the requirements of each plant can be very rewarding.
了解每种植物的需求是非常有益的。
Shanghai may be the recognized home of the soup dumplings.
上海可能是公认的小笼包之乡。

m: 有价值的;很重要的;贵重的
e: Lots of valuable objects are on show in the museum.
博物馆里展出了许多贵重物品。
Swimmingalone in the river is dangerous for children.
孩子们独自在河里游泳是很危险的。
The audience seemed skeptical, even dismissive.
听众似乎对此表示怀疑，甚至不屑一顾。
The technology has proven to help the most demanding customers.
该技术已被证明可以帮助最苛刻的客户。
Modestly, so as not to become discouraged.
要谦虚，以免变得气馁。
It was heartbreaking for her to leave home.
离开家对她来说是令人心碎的。

m: 不能容忍的;无法忍受的
e: This is merely uncomfortable, not intolerable.
这仅仅是不舒服，而不是无法忍受。
The manager is reluctant to invest in sufficient training for his staff.
经理不愿投入资源在员工的充足培训上。

m: 很害怕;恐惧;极度惊慌的
e: A lot of people are terrified about artificial intelligence.
很多人害怕人工智能。
Watering young plants in the dry season was tough for a lone boy.
对一个孤零零的男孩来说，在旱季给幼苗浇水是很困难的。
Before the 1830s, most newspapers were unattractive.
在19世纪30年代之前，大多数报纸都没有吸引力。
He was uncomfortable, and his crying let the whole campground know it.
他很不舒服，他的哭声让整个营地都知道了这一点。
It is unnecessary for us to stay behind.
我们没有必要留下来。
I soon realized that the silence was not unpleasant.
我很快意识到这种沉默并不令人不快。

m: 未满足的;失望的;不如意的
e: The concert ended a few hours too early, leaving the audience unsatisfied.
音乐会提前了几个小时结束，让观众感到不满意。
Life on Earth is diverse.
地球上的生命是多样的。
I got fed up with his constant complaining.
我受够了他不断的抱怨。
The mistake isn't a fixed aspect of your personality.
错误并不是你性格的固定方面。
The printed book remains as interactive as e-reader.
印刷书仍然像电子阅读器一样具有互动性。
These online activities will provide massive benefits.
这些在线活动将带来巨大的好处。
The potential implications for group discussion and decision-making are enormous.
(研究)对小组讨论和决策的潜在影响是巨大的。

m: 可预测的;可预见的;可预料的
e: The ending of the play was entirely predictable.
这出戏的结局是完全可以预料的。
The rises were short-lived.
这些上涨是短暂的。
Under the circumstances, a collision was unavoidable.
在这种情况下，碰撞是不可避免的。

m: 平凡的;平淡无奇的;平静无事的
e: The flight was uneventful.
这次飞行平安无事。

m: 无法辨认的;难以确认的;无法识別的
e: Jack had an unidentifiable accent.
杰克的口音难以识别。

m: 不清楚的;不确定的;不易了解的
e: But distinctions become unclear.
但差异变得不明显了。
